novelStoryPage.title: Novel Story
novelStoryPage.intro: Integrated with MEMEvideoAI to provide a three-stage flow: Create Works / My Works / Sync Tavern, supporting chapter generation, work management, and role-card sync.

creation.professionalDesc: Create and revise chapter by chapter with stronger control
creation.professionalFlow: Flow: Plan -> Refine Outline -> Write by Chapter -> Complete
creation.lightDesc: Generate by chapter count in one click for faster output
creation.lightFlow: Flow: Set Chapter Count -> One-click Generate -> One-click Continue
creation.professionalHint: Professional mode is better for fine-grained novel writing and polishing.
creation.lightHint: Light mode is better for quickly generating a full story.
creation.apiHint: API reads from cypher_tavern_settings (text/voice + image generation endpoints).
creation.autoSaveHint: Drafts are auto-saved to backend (by account when logged in, by browser when logged out).
creation.complianceNotice: Uploaded custom images will go through compliance review first (no explicit, illegal, or unethical content). Only approved images are saved.
creation.coverPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Cyber wuxia long novel cover, protagonist back view, cinematic lighting
creation.characterImagePromptPlaceholder: e.g. Anime full-body character art, detailed costume, no text
creation.chapterImagePromptPlaceholder: e.g. Rainy dock chase, neon and fog, dynamic composition
creation.professionalWorkspaceDesc: Write, continue, and fine-tune chapter by chapter, suitable for standard novel workflows.
creation.lightWorkspaceDesc: Set chapter count for batch generation, then continue in batches by chapter.
creation.generatePlanBeforeWriting: Please generate a plan before writing chapters.
creation.characterImpactPrompt: Character settings changed. Auto-rewrite impacted chapters?
creation.keepCurrentCharacters: No, continue with current character settings
creation.continuationHintLabel: Custom continuation instruction (applies to both modes)
creation.continuationHintPlaceholder: e.g. Increase suspense, add conflict between leads, keep previous dialogue rhythm

messages.fillCoreIdeaFirst: Please fill in the core idea first.
messages.generatePlanBeforeRefine: Please generate a plan before refining.
messages.outlineOptimized: Outline and chapter titles have been refined.
messages.confirmClearCharacters: Are you sure you want to clear the current character list?
messages.charactersReset: Character list has been reset to defaults.
messages.noPlotTurningPoint: No obvious plot turning point has formed in this dialogue yet.
messages.characterSettingChanged: Character settings changed. You can choose whether to auto-rewrite impacted chapters.
messages.fillCoverPromptFirst: Please enter a cover prompt first.
messages.fillCharacterPromptFirst: Please enter a character-image prompt first.
messages.fillChapterPromptFirst: Please enter a chapter-image prompt first.
messages.confirmClearDraft: Are you sure you want to clear the current draft in one click? Saved content in "My Works" will not be deleted.
messages.apiKeyMissing: API Key is not configured. Please set it in /tavern first.
messages.emptyApiText: No usable text returned from API
messages.rollbackNoHistory: No generation history available to roll back.
messages.generatePlanBeforeComplete: Please generate a plan before completing the book.
messages.confirmAutoCompleteMissingChapters: {count} chapters are still missing. Auto-generate them before completion?
messages.chapterTextMissing: Current chapter has no text yet. Generate it first.
messages.currentChapterTrimEmpty: Current chapter has no content to trim.
messages.noWrittenChapterYet: No written chapters yet. Future writing will continue with the latest character settings.
messages.confirmRewriteImpactedChapters: Rewrite the {count} generated chapters using the latest character settings?
messages.snapshotRewriteImpactedChapters: Rewrite impacted chapters after character updates
messages.rewriteImpactedDone: Updated {count} chapters with latest character settings.
messages.keepHistoryContinueWithLatestCharacters: Kept existing chapters. Future writing will continue with latest character settings.
messages.clipboardCopyFailed: Copy failed. Please check browser clipboard permissions.
messages.moderationApiKeyMissing: API Key is not configured. Please configure it in /tavern before running image moderation.
messages.moderationResponseFormatInvalid: Moderation API returned an invalid format.
messages.moderationFailed: Image moderation failed. Please ensure current model supports vision moderation.
messages.mediaUploadNoUrl: Upload API did not return a valid image URL.
messages.imageTooLarge: Image file is too large. Please keep it within {maxMb}MB.
messages.imageTooSmall: Image is too small. Minimum edge is {min}px.
messages.imageTooLargeDimension: Image dimensions are too large. Maximum edge is {max}px.
messages.imageReviewedSaved: Image passed moderation and has been saved.
messages.imageReviewedLoginFallback: Image passed moderation, but media library upload requires login. Saved as embedded content instead.
messages.customCoverSaved: Custom cover has passed moderation and was saved.
messages.imageApiNoData: Image API did not return usable image data.
messages.imageApiKeyMissing: Image API Key is not configured. Please set it in /tavern first.
messages.imageGenerateFailedWithHint: Image generation failed. Please ensure your image API supports Gemini v1beta or /images/generations.

prompts.imageModerationCheck: Please review whether this image is compliant.
prompts.imageModerationRules: Rules: disallow explicit nudity, harmful minors content, illegal/criminal content, drugs, bloody violence, hate/discrimination, extremism, and other clearly unethical content.
prompts.imageModerationSystem: You are an image safety reviewer. Output JSON only.

works.title: My Works (Work View)
works.desc: Each card here represents a complete work and is not grouped by chapter.
works.emptyList: No saved works yet. Go to "Create Works" and save one first.
works.selectWorkHint: Select a work on the left to view details.
works.backToCreationEdit: Back to Creation to Continue Editing
works.clickChapterToView: Click a chapter to view content
works.noChaptersYet: No chapter content for this work yet.
works.switchedToNewWork: Switched to new work mode. Next save will create a new work.

sync.importDesc: Import tavern roles into novel story for secondary adaptation, generate a new plan directly, and then sync cards back to tavern.
sync.secondaryPromptPlaceholder: Secondary adaptation instruction (optional), e.g. keep core personalities, switch to suspense ensemble, strengthen reversals and conflicts
sync.noImportRoles: No importable roles found. Save roles in tavern first, then refresh.
sync.cardSyncDesc: Generate cards from novel characters and sync to tavern custom roles, with worldbook-integrated card JSON output.
sync.worldBookNotesPlaceholder: Worldbook notes (timeline, factions, terms, setting details)
sync.defaultCharacterPersonality: Calm, restrained, and good at probing questions
sync.selectRolesFirst: Please select tavern roles to import first.
sync.selectedRolesNotFound: Selected tavern roles not found. Refresh and try again.
sync.noNewRolesImported: Selected roles are duplicates of current list. No new role added.
sync.importAndGenerateDone: Import and plan generation completed with {count} tavern roles.
sync.importGeneratePlanFailed: Failed to generate plan after import
sync.syncPanelCleared: Card sync panel has been cleared.
sync.selectCharacterBeforeCard: Please select a character before generating a card.
sync.syncedCurrentCharacter: Synced role "{name}" to tavern custom roles.
sync.syncedAllCharacters: Synced {count} roles to tavern custom roles.
